name: Asheville Racquet Club - Downtown
description: Asheville Racquet Club - Downtown is a place to play pickleball in Asheville, NC. There are 12 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Asheville Racquet Club - South
description: Come play pickleball at Asheville Racquet Club - South in Asheville, NC! There are 12 concrete courts. 8 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: open play sessions blocked in two hour increments by rating, times vary

name: Asheville YMCA downtown
description: Asheville YMCA downtown is a place to play pickleball in Asheville, NC. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Aston Park Tennis Facility
description: Aston Park Tennis Facility is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Asheville, NC. There are 4 outdoor clay courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Country Club of Asheville
description: Come play pickleball at Country Club of Asheville in Asheville, NC! There are 6 clay courts. 4 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Cragmont Park
description: Come play pickleball at Cragmont Park in Black Mountain, NC! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Creekside Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Creekside Pickleball Club in Black Mountain, NC! There are 8 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
fees: Members only — Can play for $15 as a guest

name: East Asheville Recreation Club
description: Come play pickleball at East Asheville Recreation Club in Asheville, NC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Weaverville
description:
The four courts are separated into pairs by the small parking lot. This is the newest court in the area constructed by the winter of ‘24. 
Note, the gates are locked in the evening, dusk to dawn (8pm-8am)
open_play_schedule:
Open 8am - 8pm in the summer. 
Open 8am - 6pm in the winter.
